name: polish_mixed_50k_v1
purpose: ZCA whitening background for siteFocus on Polish-language embeddings produced by Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-4B. Drop into `src/sitefocus/cli/run_full.py --load-whitening models/sitefocus_backgrounds/polish_mixed_50k_v1`.
notes: ZCA = U · diag(1 / sqrt(S + eps)) · U^T where Σ = U S U^T
Embeddings are L2-normalised by the model; W is applied to (x − μ).
Use `siteFocus_W = 1 − mean(siteRadius_W)` as the focus value; cross-domain comparable when this W is reused.
If a downstream eigvals_min ≈ 0 indicates rank deficiency from a smaller-than-D sample, fit on more data.
